description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a pastel pink canvas upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a prominent white star emblem on the side. The outsole is slightly textured and wraps up at the toe and heel for added durability. The heel tab appears to have a small black and white label, while the interior is lined with a soft, light-colored material. The overall design is casual and sporty, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pastel pink low-top sneaker with a white star emblem, white laces, and a white rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink canvas upper, white star emblem, and the full length of the white sole.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the white laces, rounded toe, and the shoe's overall slim profile.
description_view_2: Three-quarter view displaying the star emblem, lacing, and the smooth transition between the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel tab with a small label and the back curve of the sole.
